PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Continued To Jun-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sean Miller for Jose Estrada.

Mr. Miller stated that he was contacted by Attorney Arthur Rugama indicating that he has spoken with potential Heirs. Mr. Miller also spoke of there being a safe deposit box. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to June 17, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Miller to send notice to the distant Heirs and to the Foreign Consulate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Jones. (Not Reported)
